title: ECA partners with Birkbeck on India campus push
summary_en: Education Centre of Australia (ECA) has expanded its global campus network through a new partnership with Birkbeck, University of London, supporting the establishment of its Bengaluru campus as part of efforts to bring UK and Australian universities into India’s education landscape.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: ECA与伯贝克学院合作推进印度校区建设

title: UK international enrolments down 30% year on year
summary_en: BUILA survey points to sharp declines across South Asian markets as institutions tighten recruitment before new Home Office compliance measures take effect.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: 英国国际学生入学人数同比下降30%

title: Canada’s new student arrivals sink beneath Covid-era lows
summary_en: Canada’s new study permit approval rating dropped to 36% last year, as the number of first-time students coming to the country plunged well below Covid-era levels, recent IRCC data has revealed.
author: Polly Nash
title_cn: 加拿大新入境留学生人数跌破新冠疫情时期低点
summary_cn: 未提供对应需翻译的摘要原文内容

title: London’s ‘evening university’ to open first-ever IBC in India
summary_en: Birkbeck College, University of London, known for specialising in evening higher education in the UK, is set to open a campus in Bengaluru offering traditional three-year undergraduate and one-year postgraduate business degrees.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: 伦敦“夜大学”将在印度开设其首个国际分支校区

title: British Council set to become National Agency for Erasmus+
summary_en: The UK has taken the final steps to rejoin Erasmus+, as the British Council is named the country's National Agency for the initiative.
author: Polly Nash
title_cn: 英国文化教育协会将成为伊拉斯谟+计划国家主管机构

title: South Korea’s 310k int’l student surge brings sustainability into focus
summary_en: With South Korea now hosting more than 310,000 international students, experts say the conversation must shift from volume-driven enrolment to a more balanced and transparent policy approach.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: 韩国国际学生数量激增31万人 可持续性成为关注焦点

title: My CEO story… Reka Lenart, ALTO
summary_en: The PIE sat down with Reka Lenart, executive director at ALTO, to find out what inspires her, how a passion for capoeira keeps her energised, and the upcoming projects she's particularly excited about.
author: The PIE News team
title_cn: 我的首席执行官履职故事……雷卡·莱纳特，国际语言游学协会（ALTO）
